title: Custom Resin Animal Figurines
description: Hand-painted resin animal figurines for seasonal gifts, home shelves and souvenir collections. Custom mold, color, size and logo available.

title: Wooden Tabletop Decor Set
description: Warm wooden decoration items for farmhouse, Nordic and modern home styles. Available in pine, MDF, with laser engraving or painting.

title: Decorative Candle Holders
description: Ceramic and metal candle holders for home fragrance brands, seasonal gift sets and room decor. Custom glaze color and gift box packaging.

title: Woven Storage Baskets
description: Natural seagrass, cotton rope and water hyacinth storage baskets for home organization, picnic, gift hamper and retail lifestyle display.

title: Private Label Gift Boxes
description: Retail-ready gift packaging with custom logo, insert card, hangtag and barcode. Suitable for holiday, promotional and e-commerce gift projects.

title: Ceramic Style Seasonal Decor
description: Warm handmade-style ceramic decorations for holiday, housewarming and souvenir retail buyers. Custom glaze colors, shapes and seasonal themes.

title: Resin Holiday Figurines
description: Christmas, Easter, Halloween and seasonal resin figurines with hand-painted details. Custom holiday themes, packaging and private label options.

title: Wooden Holiday Ornaments
description: Laser-engraved and hand-painted wooden ornaments for Christmas trees, holiday gift tags and seasonal retail displays. Custom shape and design.

title: Scented Candle Gift Sets
description: Complete candle gift sets with ceramic holders, scented soy wax candles and gift box packaging. Custom fragrance, color and private label available.

title: Woven Picnic Basket Set
description: Seagrass and rattan picnic basket sets with lining, cutlery compartments and leather straps. Ideal for gift hamper, outdoor retail and lifestyle brands.

title: Custom Logo Display Packaging
description: Premium display packaging with custom logo, window cutout, magnetic closure and foam insert. Designed for retail shelf presentation of handmade gift products.

title: Mixed Seasonal Gift Collection
description: Curated mixed collection combining resin figurines, wooden decor, candle holders and gift packaging in one seasonal order program. Perfect for retail seasonal launches.
